mapper.insert:
MERGE INTO recent_view rv
USING ( SELECT #{userNo} AS user_no, #{stockCode} AS stock_code FROM dual ) src
ON ( rv.user_no = src.user_no AND rv.stock_code = src.stock_code )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET rv.viewed_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE rv.viewed_at < SYSTIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '10' SECOND
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( user_no, stock_code, viewed_at ) VALUES ( src.user_no, src.stock_code, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM recent_view WHERE (user_no, stock_code) IN ( SELECT user_no, stock_code FROM ( SELECT user_no, stock_code, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY viewed_at DESC) rn FROM recent_view WHERE user_no = #{userNo} ) WHERE rn > 20 )
